summary: The Gradle build failed because one or more tests in the hibernate-core module did not pass. The build exited with code 1 after 17 minutes 39 seconds. The specific failing test names and assertion details are not present in the provided log context.
root_cause: One or more JUnit tests in the hibernate-core module failed at runtime, causing Gradle to throw a MarkedVerificationException and abort the build with exit code 1.

evidence.quote: Caused by: org.gradle.api.internal.exceptions.MarkedVerificationException: There were failing tests. See the report at: file:///home/runner/work/hibernate-orm/hibernate-orm/hibernate-core/target/reports/tests/test/index.html
evidence.reason: This is the direct Gradle exception that indicates at least one test in hibernate-core failed at runtime, which is the proximate cause of the build failure.
Confirms the overall build was marked as failed, consistent with the test failure causing a non-zero exit.
The process exit code 1 confirms the GitHub Actions step failed, triggered by the test failures reported by Gradle.
Multiple orphaned Java processes were left running at cleanup time, suggesting a test JVM may have hung or crashed during execution.

suggested_fix: Download and inspect the uploaded artifact 'test-reports-java11-hsqldb' (artifact ID 6873437411) or the HTML report at hibernate-core/target/reports/tests/test/index.html to identify the specific failing test classes and assertion errors, then address the root cause in those tests.
